name: Apex Trading Asia
brandVoice: Terse, clinical, zero fluff. Numbers and levels only. The desk note you read at 6am before the Asian session opens. No pleasantries, no hand-holding. Every word earns its place or gets cut.
audienceProfile: Professional and semi-professional prop traders in the Asia-Pacific timezone. They trade 10+ lots, understand risk management, and want signals not stories.
